{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Hall of Healing
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Hall of Healing]] is a location where patients are treated.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
